import asyncio
from database import engine, Base
from models.models import Project, BomLine, QwPrice, CbomRow, NreLine, ExInvRow, User

async def reset\(\):
    async with engine.begin\(\) as conn:
        await conn.run_sync\(Base.metadata.drop_all\)
        await conn.run_sync\(Base.metadata.create_all\)
    print\('Tables recreated'\)

asyncio.run\(reset\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "D:\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\BuLLMQuote - UI\\bullmquote\\backend" && python -c "
import asyncio
from database import get_db
from models.models import User
from sqlalchemy import select
from passlib.context import CryptContext

pwd_ctx = CryptContext\(schemes=['bcrypt'], deprecated='auto'\)

async def test\(\):
    async for db in get_db\(\):
        result = await db.execute\(select\(User\).where\(User.username == 'admin'\)\)
        user = result.scalar_one_or_none\(\)
        if user:
            print\('Username:', user.username\)
            print\('Hashed pw:', user.hashed_pw[:60] if user.hashed_pw else 'NONE'\)
            print\('Verifies bullm@2025:', pwd_ctx.verify\('bullm@2025', user.hashed_pw\) if user.hashed_pw else False\)

asyncio.run\(test\(\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "D:\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\BuLLMQuote - UI\\bullmquote" && python -X utf8 -c "
import requests
BASE = 'http://localhost:8000'
API  = BASE + '/api'

def get_token\(user='admin', pwd='bullm@2025'\):
    r = requests.post\(f'{API}/auth/login', data={'username': user, 'password': pwd}\)
    return r.json\(\).get\('access_token'\) if r.ok else None

TOKEN = get_token\(\)
H = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {TOKEN}'}
print\('TOKEN:', TOKEN[:30] if TOKEN else 'NONE'\)

r = requests.get\(f'{API}/projects', headers=H\)
print\('GET /projects:', r.status_code, r.text[:300]\)

r2 = requests.post\(f'{API}/projects', headers={**H,'Content-Type':'application/json'},
    json={'code':'E2E-TEST','customer':'Test','description':'e2e'}\)
print\('POST /projects:', r2.status_code, r2.text[:300]\)

r3 = requests.get\(f'{API}/auth/users', headers=H\)
print\('GET /auth/users:', r3.status_code, r3.text[:300]\)

r4 = requests.post\(f'{API}/auth/register', headers={**H,'Content-Type':'application/json'},
    json={'username':'e2e_testuser','email':'e2e@test.com','password':'Test@1234','role':'viewer'}\)
print\('POST /auth/register:', r4.status_code, r4.text[:300]\)
")

import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(r'C:/Users/Asus/Downloads/AWARDS_PART_NUMBER_LISTING_CE-005570-TI_CLEAN_MOBILITY_-HCV_BMS_FLOAT_20250804.xlsx', read_only=True, data_only=True\)
ws = wb.active
print\('Sheet name:', ws.title\)
print\('Max col:', ws.max_column\)
print\(\)
print\('--- Row 17 \(expected headers\) ---'\)
row17 = list\(ws.iter_rows\(min_row=17, max_row=17, values_only=True\)\)[0]
for i, v in enumerate\(row17\):
    if v: print\(f'  col {i} \(Excel col {i+1}\): {repr\(v\)}'\)
print\(\)
print\('--- Row 18 \(first data row\) ---'\)
row18 = list\(ws.iter_rows\(min_row=18, max_row=18, values_only=True\)\)[0]
for i, v in enumerate\(row18\):
    if v is not None: print\(f'  col {i} \(Excel col {i+1}\): {repr\(v\)}'\)
print\(\)
print\('--- Rows 1-16 metadata ---'\)
for r_idx, row in enumerate\(ws.iter_rows\(min_row=1, max_row=16, values_only=True\), start=1\):
    vals = [\(i, v\) for i, v in enumerate\(row\) if v is not None]
    if vals: print\(f'  Row {r_idx}: {vals[:8]}'\)
wb.close\(\)
